node.statement: SUBROUTINE 2E — QSVT for Matrix Square Root: Given a block encoding of positive semidefinite H with I/kappa <= H <= I, implement a block encoding of H^{1/2} via QSVT polynomial approximation to the square root function on [1/kappa, 1]. Applied to C^{1/2} and the final composition Pi_C (C^(p))^{1/2} Pi_C. Uses Lemma 25 with c=1/2.
